jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Byju's - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
